name: salesdoc
description: Monorepo: bitta buyruqda API + web panel

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.repair:next: node scripts/free-dev-ports.cjs 3000 3001 3002 3003 && npm run clean --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: node scripts/free-dev-ports.cjs && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:sync: node scripts/free-dev-ports.cjs && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on -t 600000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4000 && npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:clean: npm run ports:free && npm run clean --prefix frontend && npm run dev
scripts.dev:alt: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "cross-env PORT=4001 npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- -p 3010"
scripts.dev:alt:sync: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "cross-env PORT=4001 npm run dev --prefix backend" "wait-on -t 600000 tcp:127.0.0.1:4001 && npm run dev --prefix frontend -- -p 3010"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:ci --prefix backend && npm run test:ci --prefix frontend
scripts.test:all:ci: npm run test:ci --prefix backend && npm run test:all --prefix frontend
scripts.test:all: npm run test:all:ci && npm run load:smoke
